text: Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Rachel. So I'm calling because they're pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through West Virginia State Relief Program. So have you received any notification about these benefits yet? Yes, so I was asking if you've received the notification.
